questionHtml: There are various equivalent versions of the second law of thermodynamics. Outline the benefit gained by having alternative forms of a law.
markschemeHtml:
different paradigms/ways of thinking/modelling/views

allows testing in different ways

laws can be applied different situations

 

OWTTE
